creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, you're misunderstanding.  Did you see the port? net/xrdp has runtime dependeny on x11-servers/x11rdp. 

xrdp and x11rdp are different things.  xrdp is a server of RDP protocol. x11rdp is a X server designed to cooperate with xrdp.  They work together.  Like Xvnc,
x11rdp is fundamentally a X server.

It is true x11rdp was formerly named Xrdp (capitalize is important).  Once Xrdp
as a X server and xrdp (all small letters) as a RDP server existed at the same time and they work together.  It was very confusing.  Thus Xrdp as X server was
renamed to x11rdp.  Just a historical story.
